layer_map.what: Inline SVG Icon component + project-owned typed icon-path set (40 icons, 16x16, 1.5px stroke)
Dropdown/popover, Modal, Toast wrapping Radix behavior, styled via semantic classes
zustand toastStore (queue + auto/manual/pause) + imperative toast() API + minimal Icon glue — only what Radix does not provide
Dev-only in-app route rendering every primitive in all states
Per-component semantic-class stylesheets bound to existing CSS custom properties; no inline styles; no token authoring
layer_map.files: src/renderer/styles/tokens.css (consume only), per-component CSS under atoms/ + molecules/

layer_map.what: Add Vitest + @testing-library/react + user-event (jsdom) + Playwright component tests; record stack in docs

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Radix unified `radix-ui` package — `import { Dialog, DropdownMenu, Popover, Toast } from "radix-ui"`
key_design_decisions.why: Mature Dialog/DropdownMenu/Popover/Toast; official React 19; unstyled + className styling; best correctness-per-line for bug-prone focus/keyboard/a11y (research.md)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: React Aria (more code/heavier API); Base UI (smaller battle-test surface); Ark UI (heavier XState abstraction); Headless UI (Tailwind-oriented, no Toast); hand-rolled Floating UI + `<dialog>` (re-incurs the a11y bug class)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: THIN: only toastStore + toast() API + minimal Icon glue; Radix owns focus-trap/positioning
key_design_decisions.why: constitution §6.3 + §7 "keep lib/ thin"; hand-rolling focus-trap/positioning duplicates Radix
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Hand-rolled overlay substrate (focus-trap/positioning utilities) — duplicates Radix, largest test burden

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: zustand `toastStore` owns the stack (enqueue/dequeue/auto-dismiss/manual-dismiss/hover-focus-pause); drives Radix `Toast.Root`/`Toast.Viewport` render
key_design_decisions.why: constitution §4 shared-state-in-zustand; Radix Toast is a render/a11y primitive, not a queue. Covers AC-8/AC-9/AC-10/AC-22
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Radix-only Toast (cannot own stacking/rapid-fire/pause — §9 risk 1); component-local useState queue (violates §4)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Project-owned typed string-literal-union `IconName` over the 40-icon set + safe fallback for unknown name
key_design_decisions.why: constitution §3.1 typed union, no any; §7 Icon project-owned. Covers AC-23 (known → render) + AC-13 (unknown → fallback, no throw)
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Icon-library dependency (violates §7); untyped `name: string` (violates §3.1); throw on unknown (violates AC-13)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Semantic class names bound to existing tokens.css CSS custom properties; per-component stylesheets; zero inline styles
key_design_decisions.why: constitution §7 + AC-18; Radix parts accept className, satisfying the constraint directly
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Inline styles (violates AC-18); CSS-in-JS runtime (new dep, not token-bound); token authoring/switching (§6 OOS theming engine)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Vitest + @testing-library/react + user-event (jsdom) for interaction; Playwright component tests for real-browser focus/keyboard fidelity
key_design_decisions.why: constitution §3.4; jsdom focus/keyboard gaps covered by Playwright (research.md). Set up first per §9 risk 2; record in docs per AC-24
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: happy-dom (less complete focus/range API); jsdom-only (focus/keyboard fidelity gaps hide a11y defects)

file_impact.what_changes: Inline SVG Icon component (typed `name`, size, className; fallback on unknown)
Project-owned typed icon-path set (40 icons) + `IconName` union
Dropdown/popover wrapping Radix DropdownMenu/Popover, semantic-class styled
Modal wrapping Radix Dialog (focus trap, scrim, Escape, body scroll lock)
Toast rendering Radix Toast.Root/Viewport driven by toastStore
Dev-only route exercising every primitive in all states
Semantic-class stylesheets bound to tokens.css custom properties
Add `radix-ui` dep; add vitest/@testing-library/react/user-event/jsdom/Playwright dev deps + `test` script
Vitest + jsdom config for renderer interaction tests
Record the chosen renderer test stack (AC-24)
Mount the single Radix Toast.Provider/Viewport + portal container once

doc_impact.what_changes: Record the renderer test stack (Vitest + Testing Library + Playwright) per constitution §3.4 / AC-24; note the primitives layer + layering (presentation → thin lib support)
Note the UI primitives layer as a building block once it lands

risks.risk: Radix Toast may not natively cover stacking + hover/focus pause + rapid-fire queue
risks.mitigation: The zustand toastStore owns the queue; Radix Toast renders individual items. Derisk spike before broad rollout

risks.risk: No test framework exists — Vitest + Playwright setup is a gating prerequisite that could slip
risks.mitigation: Make test-stack setup the first task; record the stack in docs/architecture.md (§3.4)

risks.risk: Nested-overlay composition (Escape topmost-only, nested focus-trap/return) is the most failure-prone behavior
risks.mitigation: Prototype nested behavior early; dedicated interaction + Playwright tests

risks.risk: Styling Radix component state (open/closed, side) via semantic classes may fight the token-driven stylesheet
risks.mitigation: Spike a Radix Dialog + DropdownMenu styled solely via token CSS vars before broad rollout

risks.risk: jsdom may not faithfully reproduce focus/keyboard behavior, hiding real a11y defects
risks.mitigation: Run Playwright component tests in a real browser for focus/keyboard fidelity

risks.risk: Dependency-direction leak: molecules using deep relative imports, or lib/ importing from components/ (support → presentation inversion)
risks.mitigation: Mandate `@renderer` alias; lib/ must not import from components/; lint/CBM import-direction check

risks.risk: Toast singleton boundary: multiple toastStore instances split the queue
risks.mitigation: Single module-level store export; `toast()` calls `toastStore.getState().enqueue(...)`, never instantiates per-consumer

risks.risk: Radix portal mount point not established at renderer root — detached node breaks z-order/scrim
risks.mitigation: Mount the single Provider/Viewport + portal container at App root once; document it

risks.risk: Demo route (PrimitivesDemo) ships in the production bundle
risks.mitigation: Gate behind a dev-only conditional / route guard so it is unreachable / tree-shaken in packaged builds

specialist_consultation.sub_question: Layer map, key design decisions, risks, constitution flags, minimal change, OOS-respect for the primitives layer
specialist_consultation.input_summary: Authored all Phase 2 table rows; Radix-backed overlays + project-owned Icon/Toast-queue/styling; thin lib/; no departures; all decisions in-scope

dependencies: - No services, env vars, or main/preload changes.
